commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5ffc166bfa2dc0ca4ba147807c8945ccbe55f52a)
commands.review_summary:
The PR hardens public skill file, tag, list, and latest-version readers against moderated, soft-deleted, stale, or cross-skill version data.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main follows stale latestVersionId/tag pointers in public routes, while the PR code and tests model cross-skill and soft-deleted pointers; I did not run tests because this is a read-only review and test commands may write artifacts.
commands.review_followup: Maintainers need a rollout decision for the new digest marker and contributor-supplied real behavior proof before merge.

target.title: fix(api): guard moderated skill files and tags
target.body:
## Summary

Hardens public skill artifact readers and latest-version serializers so stale, cross-skill, soft-deleted, or moderated data cannot leak through alternate public paths.

## What changed

- Public skill file readers now share the same moderation block semantics as ZIP downloads.
- Skill tags must point at a non-deleted version that belongs to the same skill.
- Digest-backed public lists fail closed unless the denormalized latest-version owner marker matches the skill.
- `getBySlug` suppresses `latestVersion` when the latest row is soft-deleted or belongs to another skill.
- `resolveVersionByHash` suppresses stale, cross-skill, or soft-deleted `latestVersion` rows instead of serializing them.
- The digest/backfill validation model stays intact; expensive validation is still kept out of hot public list paths.

## Public behavior

Invalid latest-version state becomes `null`/absent in public detail and resolver responses. It is never returned as a serialized stale version object.

Moderated file and package compatibility readers fail closed. Cross-skill tags and soft-deleted versions are rejected instead of being treated as public artifacts.

## Behavior proof

Focused terminal proof from the public readers and tag/file boundaries:

```text
$ vitest run convex/skills.public.test.ts "convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts" convex/downloads.test.ts convex/skills.deleteTags.test.ts convex/skills.publicListCursor.test.ts convex/lib/skillSearchDigest.test.ts --reporter verbose --testNamePattern "soft-deleted latest version|latest version that belongs to another skill|stale API list latest versions|stale trending latest versions|malware-blocked|another skill's tagged version|another skill's version|soft-deleted versions|stale latest-version metadata"

✓ convex/lib/skillSearchDigest.test.ts > extractValidatedDigestFields > clears stale latest-version metadata when the version belongs to another skill
✓ convex/skills.publicListCursor.test.ts > public skill list deterministic cursors > drops stale API list latest versions that belong to another skill
✓ convex/skills.publicListCursor.test.ts > public skill list deterministic cursors > drops stale trending latest versions that belong to another skill
✓ convex/skills.public.test.ts > skills.getBySlug > does not expose a latest version that belongs to another skill
✓ convex/skills.public.test.ts > skills.getBySlug > does not expose a soft-deleted latest version
✓ convex/skills.public.test.ts > skills.resolveVersionByHash > does not expose a soft-deleted latest version
✓ convex/skills.public.test.ts > skills.resolveVersionByHash > does not expose a latest version that belongs to another skill
✓ convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts > httpApiV1 handlers > does not resolve scan tags to another skill's version
✓ convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts > httpApiV1 handlers > blocks raw file reads for malware-blocked skills
✓ convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts > httpApiV1 handlers > does not serve raw files from another skill's tagged version
✓ convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts > httpApiV1 handlers > packages file blocks skill compatibility files for malware-blocked skills
✓ convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts > httpApiV1 handlers > packages file does not serve skill tags pointing at another skill's version
✓ convex/downloads.test.ts > downloads helpers > does not serve a tag that points at another skill's version
✓ convex/skills.deleteTags.test.ts > updateTags > rejects tag updates to another skill's version
✓ convex/skills.deleteTags.test.ts > updateTags > rejects tag updates to soft-deleted versions

Test Files  6 passed (6)
Tests  15 passed | 237 skipped (252)
```

Full focused suite also passed:

```text
$ bun run test convex/skills.public.test.ts convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts convex/downloads.test.ts convex/skills.deleteTags.test.ts convex/skills.publicListCursor.test.ts convex/lib/skillSearchDigest.test.ts
Test Files  6 passed (6)
Tests       252 passed (252)
```

## Validation

```text
$ bun run ci:static
passed
```

```text
$ bun run ci:unit
Test Files  204 passed (204)
Tests       2003 passed (2003)
Statements  85.98%
Branches    75.17%
Functions   86.37%
Lines        89.48%
```

```text
$ bun run ci:types-build
tsc, package typechecks, clawhub-mod typecheck, Vite build, and Nitro build passed.
```
target.author: vyctorbrzezowski

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
